description: Address review findings: fix utcnow in dashboard, improve backtest rotation memory usage, use logging in cron, replace structural test with behavioral test, add comment on bare except
steps: 1. Fix utcnow() in dashboard/app.py - replace with datetime.now(timezone.utc)
2. Improve backtest rotation in src/augur/backtest.py using collections.deque
3. Use logging instead of print() in cron.py error handler
4. Replace structural test with behavioral test in tests/test_backtest.py
5. Add comment explaining bare except in backtest rotation
acceptance_criteria: Backtest rotation uses deque instead of readlines()
Cron error handler uses logger.error() instead of print()
